revision.text: {{This is a redirect/rcat}} {{Redirect template |id=R mentioned in hatnote |name=Mentioned in a hatnote |from=a title that is mentioned in a [[Wikipedia:Hatnote|hatnote]] at the redirect target. The mention is usually atop the ''target article''. It may, however, be directly under a section header, or in another article's hatnote (whenever the hatnote is under a section, {{tl|R to section}} should also be used) |info=** The titles of redirects mentioned in hatnotes may refer to a subject other than that of the target page. It is possible that this redirect may need to be retargeted, or become an article under its own title (see {{tl|R with possibilities}}). If the title is a good candidate for a [[wikt:|Wiktionary]] link, it may also be added. |all category=Redirects mentioned in hatnotes }} {{Documentation}}

{{This is a redirect/rcat}} {{Redirect template |id=R mentioned in hatnote |name=Mentioned in a hatnote |from=a title that is mentioned in a [[Wikipedia:Hatnote|hatnote]] at the redirect target. The mention is usually atop the ''target article''. It may, however, be directly under a section header, or in another article's hatnote (whenever the hatnote is under a section, {{tl|R to section}} should also be used) |info=** The titles of redirects mentioned in hatnotes may refer to a subject other than that of the target page. It is possible that this redirect may need to be retargeted, or become an article under its own title (see {{tl|R with possibilities}}). If the title is a good candidate for a [[wikt:|Wiktionary]] link, it may also be added. |all category=Redirects mentioned in hatnotes }} {{Documentation}}

revision.comment: Adding [[Category:pages from wikipedia]][[en:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:pages from wikipedia]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]

It may, however, be directly under a section header, or in another article's hatnote (whenever the hatnote is under a section, {{tl|R to section}} should also be used) |info=** The titles of redirects mentioned in hatnotes may refer to a subject other than that of the target page. It is possible that this redirect may need to be retargeted, or become an article under its own title (see {{tl|R with possibilities}}). If the title is a good candidate for a [[wikt:|Wiktionary]] link, it may also be added. |all category=Redirects mentioned in hatnotes }} {{Documentation}} [[Category:pages from wikipedia]][[en:R mentioned in hatnote]][[Category:pages from wikipedia]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
